nodes.label: If the position of the pads is too low on the rim, as shown in , the pads can move. This could cause the separation of the spokes from their mountings., they could slip off causing the spokes to be torn out of their mountings.

nodes.label: Do not use a that has high pressure. A water hose that has high pressure can cause some parts to become loose or full of water.

properties.text: Do not use a that has high pressure. A water hose that has high pressure can cause some parts to become loose or full of water.

nodes.label: Do not point the hose directly at the hub or at the bottom bracket bearings. This can cause damage to the parts.

properties.text: Do not point the hose directly at the hub or at the bottom bracket bearings. This can cause damage to the parts.

nodes.label: Apply in accordance with the instruction on the container. The substance may cause damage to the Bike paint if it is not applied correctly.

nodes.label: Wheels must be true for rim brakes to work effectively.

properties.text: Wheels must be true for rim brakes to work effectively.

nodes.label: When you remove the rear wheel to repair a puncture, disconnect the brake arm from the chain stay.

properties.text: When you remove the rear wheel to repair a puncture, disconnect the brake arm from the chain stay.

nodes.label: Be careful with sharp or hard tools. They can cause damage to the inner tube.

properties.text: Be careful with sharp or hard tools. They can cause damage to the inner tube.

nodes.label: Be sure to operate on a white surface in order to prevent lost of part that could fall on the floor.

properties.text: Be sure to operate on a white surface in order to prevent lost of part that could fall on the floor.

nodes.label: Do not tighten the stem bolt too much. You can cause damage to the headset bearings if you tighten the stem too much.

properties.text: Do not tighten the stem bolt too much. You can cause damage to the headset bearings if you tighten the stem too much.

nodes.label: The stem bolt does not safety the stem.

properties.text: The stem bolt does not safety the stem.

nodes.label: Make sure the handlebar is correctly aligned in the center of the stem.

properties.text: Make sure the handlebar is correctly aligned in the center of the stem.

nodes.label: Do not get lubrication oil into the brake system. Oil in the break system can affect the efficiency of the bake system. Do not get oil onto the floor where it can easily get transferred onto the brake system.

properties.text: Do not get lubrication oil into the brake system. Oil in the break system can affect the efficiency of the bake system. Do not get oil onto the floor where it can easily get transferred onto the brake system.

nodes.label: Make sure you do not lose the bearings from the hub. Be prepared to catch the bearings if they fall out. Missing bearings can cause damage to the hub.

properties.text: Make sure you do not lose the bearings from the hub. Be prepared to catch the bearings if they fall out. Missing bearings can cause damage to the hub.

nodes.label: Incorrect tightening force can result in component failure, leading to loss of control.

nodes.label: Riding the bike on a tire that has visible damage could cause the tire to fail, leading to loss of control.

nodes.label: Riding a wheel that is at the end of its usable life can result in wheel failure and loss of control.

properties.text: Riding a wheel that is at the end of its usable life can result in wheel failure and loss of control.

nodes.label: Do not ride a bicycle with no grips on the handlebar. This can cause the hands of the rider to slip.

nodes.label: Do not ride the bicycle until the grips have become dry and are firmly held in position. If the grips are wet, your hands can move off the grips when you ride the bicycle.
